# Rewansh — Digital Marketing Consultant

> Rewansh (Rewansh Kayare) is a digital marketing consultant based in India, working with startups, D2C brands, SaaS companies, and enterprises across India, the US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, and other markets remotely. Core services: SEO & search growth, paid media (Google Ads & Meta Ads), content marketing, marketing automation & AI systems, social media marketing, and conversion rate optimization.

Rewansh works directly with founders and marketing teams as a hands-on consultant, not through an account-managed agency team. Every engagement starts with an audit before any spend commitment. Pricing starts at $349 + tax for a one-time strategy session, with ongoing "Growth Partner" retainers from $549 + tax/month and custom enterprise engagements. All work is fully remote, covering overlapping hours across time zones for international clients — including founders and marketing teams in Indore and Hyderabad, with no local office required.

## Services

- [SEO & Search Growth](https://rewansh.com/seo-search-growth/): Technical SEO audits, intent-mapped keyword strategy, and content-driven link building for search engines and AI answer engines.
- [Paid Media & PPC](https://rewansh.com/paid-media-ppc/): Google Ads and Meta Ads strategy, audience targeting, conversion tracking, and creative testing.
- [IT Infrastructure & Growth](https://rewansh.com/it-infrastructure-growth/): Martech stack audits, tool consolidation, hosting, and integration work behind marketing systems.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://rewansh.com/social-media-marketing/): LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube content systems for founders and brands.
- [Marketing Automation](https://rewansh.com/marketing-automation/): AI-powered content, email, and lead-generation systems; CRM workflows and drip sequences.
- [Content Marketing](https://rewansh.com/content-marketing/): Content strategy tied directly to SEO and lead generation, not just publishing volume.
- [Conversion Rate Optimization](https://rewansh.com/conversion-rate-optimization/): Landing page and funnel optimization measured against acquisition cost.
- [Wikipedia Page Creation](https://rewansh.com/wikipedia-page-creation/): Notability-first Wikipedia page creation with disclosed paid contributions — no guaranteed placement.

## Company

- [About](https://rewansh.com/about/): Rewansh Kayare's background, credentials, and working approach.
- [Contact](https://rewansh.com/contact/): Book a strategy session or reach Rewansh directly.

## Markets

- [United States](https://rewansh.com/us/): Remote digital marketing consulting with full US business-hours overlap and USD invoicing.
- [United Kingdom](https://rewansh.com/uk/): Remote digital marketing consulting with full UK business-hours overlap.
- [UAE](https://rewansh.com/uae/): Remote digital marketing consulting covering Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and the wider UAE.
- [Dubai](https://rewansh.com/dubai/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Dubai startups and brands, including DIFC, DMCC, and JAFZA free zone companies.
- [Germany](https://rewansh.com/germany/): Remote digital marketing consulting with GDPR-conscious marketing automation and CET/CEST overlap.
- [Mumbai](https://rewansh.com/mumbai/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Mumbai D2C, fintech, and services businesses.
- [Bangalore](https://rewansh.com/bangalore/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Bangalore SaaS and B2B tech startups.
- [Delhi NCR](https://rewansh.com/delhi/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Delhi, Gurugram, and Noida businesses.
- [Pune](https://rewansh.com/pune/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Pune IT, D2C, and services businesses.

## Articles

- [Free Lead Enrichment Tools for Startups (What They Actually Do)](https://rewansh.com/blog/free-lead-enrichment-tools-for-startups.html): What lead enrichment categories actually solve, realistic free-tier limits, and the real signal it's time to pay.
- [Google Ads Cost Per Acquisition: Why Benchmarks Are the Wrong Target](https://rewansh.com/blog/google-ads-cost-per-acquisition-benchmarks.html): Why published CPA benchmarks are a poor target, and the LTV-based formula for calculating your own valid ceiling.
- [Marketing Automation Consultant Pricing: What Actually Drives the Cost](https://rewansh.com/blog/marketing-automation-consultant-pricing.html): What actually drives automation consulting pricing — platform, migration vs. net-new, and the questions to ask before comparing quotes.
- [How to Set Up Lead Scoring in HubSpot, Step by Step](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-set-up-lead-scoring-in-hubspot.html): A step-by-step HubSpot lead scoring setup — explicit vs. implicit criteria, MQL thresholds, and the mistakes that break scores.
- [5 Marketing Automation Workflows Every SaaS Company Needs](https://rewansh.com/blog/marketing-automation-workflows-for-saas.html): Five automation workflows every SaaS company should have built — onboarding, trial nurture, dunning, expansion, and churn-risk re-engagement.
- [Search Engine Positioning Strategy: Competing Against Bigger Sites](https://rewansh.com/blog/search-engine-positioning-strategy.html): How to compete in search against bigger, established competitors by finding underserved angles instead of head-on keyword battles.
- [AI Agent Tools for Content Creation: The Category Landscape](https://rewansh.com/blog/ai-agent-tools-for-content-creation.html): A categorized landscape of AI content agents — research, drafting, editing, and distribution — and where human review can't be skipped.
- [Marketing Funnel Optimization Metrics: What to Track at Each Stage](https://rewansh.com/blog/marketing-funnel-optimization-metrics.html): Which metrics actually matter at each funnel stage — awareness, consideration, decision, retention — and the vanity-metric traps to avoid.
- [Dynamic Search Ads Best Practices](https://rewansh.com/blog/dynamic-search-ads-best-practices.html): When Dynamic Search Ads make sense, how to structure targets, and the negative keyword discipline they need.
- [A Lead Generation Quiz Funnel Framework](https://rewansh.com/blog/lead-generation-quiz-funnel-framework.html): A question-design, segmentation, and follow-up framework for a quiz funnel that produces qualified leads.
- [Outbound vs. Inbound Lead Generation: Which Should You Prioritize?](https://rewansh.com/blog/outbound-vs-inbound-lead-generation.html): Speed, cost, and quality trade-offs between outbound and inbound, and how to sequence both deliberately.
- [A Local SEO Audit, Step by Step](https://rewansh.com/blog/local-seo-audit-step-by-step.html): A 5-step local SEO audit covering Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and local link building.
- [How to Increase Conversion Rate Without Spending More on Ads](https://rewansh.com/blog/increase-conversion-rate-without-ads.html): Four non-paid conversion rate levers — traffic quality, on-site experience, trust, and email capture.
- [D2C Retention Marketing Strategies](https://rewansh.com/blog/d2c-retention-marketing-strategies.html): Four D2C retention tactics — lifecycle flows, loyalty, subscriptions, win-back — and how to prioritize them.
- [B2B Lead Generation Landing Page Structure](https://rewansh.com/blog/b2b-lead-generation-landing-page-structure.html): Form placement, B2B-specific proof, and CTA choice patterns matched to funnel stage and multi-stakeholder buying.
- [Search Query Optimization for Google Ads: An Ongoing Maintenance Guide](https://rewansh.com/blog/search-query-optimization-google-ads.html): A recurring maintenance cadence for Google Ads search query optimization — negatives, match types, and overlap.
- [Inbound Lead Generation Channel Strategies for Tech Startups](https://rewansh.com/blog/inbound-lead-generation-strategies-tech-startups.html): Four inbound channels for tech startups and the order to sequence investment across them.
- [A Programmatic SEO Guide for Beginners](https://rewansh.com/blog/programmatic-seo-guide-for-beginners.html): A step-by-step beginner's process for building programmatic SEO pages that avoid thin duplicate content.
- [How to Clean an Email List Before a Campaign](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-clean-email-list-before-campaign.html): A 5-step process for cleaning an email list safely, and how to re-warm sending after a big cleanup.
- [Growth Marketing Strategies for D2C Fashion Brands](https://rewansh.com/blog/growth-marketing-strategies-d2c-fashion.html): Five growth levers specific to D2C fashion — UGC, creators, drops, fit content, and returns as retention.
- [The Best AI Workflows for Marketing Teams (Beyond Lead Gen)](https://rewansh.com/blog/best-ai-workflows-for-marketing-teams.html): AI workflows across content, paid media, and reporting — and exactly where human review still belongs.
- [Local Service Ads Optimization Tips](https://rewansh.com/blog/local-service-ads-optimization-tips.html): Why Local Services Ads reward reviews and response time over bidding, and how to keep cost per lead honest.
- [A High-Converting Landing Page Copy Framework](https://rewansh.com/blog/high-converting-landing-page-copy-framework.html): A headline/subhead/proof/CTA copywriting framework with illustrative before-and-after patterns.
- [What Changes When Scaling a D2C Brand From 7 to 8 Figures](https://rewansh.com/blog/scale-d2c-brand-to-8-figures.html): The operational, team, and channel-risk shifts that define scaling a D2C brand from 7 to 8 figures.

- [Evergreen Content Assets That Actually Drive Conversions](https://rewansh.com/blog/evergreen-content-assets-that-drive-conversions.html): How to tell genuinely evergreen content from content that's just old, and how to pick what to build.
- [B2B Marketing Automation Tools by Startup Stage](https://rewansh.com/blog/b2b-marketing-automation-tools-by-startup-stage.html): Why the right B2B marketing automation tool depends on funding stage more than budget alone.

- [A Content Strategy for a Zero-Click Search World](https://rewansh.com/blog/zero-click-search-content-strategy.html): Shifting content strategy from winning the click to winning the citation as zero-click search grows.

- [An Ecommerce SEO Audit Checklist](https://rewansh.com/blog/ecommerce-seo-audit-checklist.html): The ecommerce-specific SEO issues (faceted nav, variants, discontinued products) a generic audit checklist misses.

- [A Content Strategy Framework for Ecommerce](https://rewansh.com/blog/content-strategy-framework-ecommerce.html): Four ecommerce content types mapped to funnel stage, and the coverage gap most catalogs leave open.
- [A LinkedIn Thought Leadership Content Strategy for Founders](https://rewansh.com/blog/linkedin-thought-leadership-content-strategy.html): How to choose a point of view, cadence, and engagement approach that builds real LinkedIn authority.
- [Why Website Clicks From Search Are Dropping (Even With Stable Impressions)](https://rewansh.com/blog/why-website-clicks-from-search-are-dropping.html): A CTR-specific diagnostic for when Search Console shows dropping clicks but stable impressions and position.
- [Copywriter vs. Content Marketing Strategist: What's the Difference?](https://rewansh.com/blog/copywriter-vs-content-marketing-strategist.html): What each role actually owns, and which one to hire first depending on whether the gap is strategy or execution.
- [How to Build a High-Intent Keyword List](https://rewansh.com/blog/building-a-high-intent-keyword-list.html): Four sources for sourcing genuinely high-intent keywords that standard volume-sorted tools tend to miss.
- [The GA4 Data Retention Limit: What It Actually Means and How to Fix It](https://rewansh.com/blog/google-analytics-4-data-retention-limit-fix.html): What GA4's data retention setting actually controls, why the default is shorter than most expect, and the fix.
- [A Content Refreshing Strategy for Organic Growth](https://rewansh.com/blog/content-refreshing-strategy-organic-growth.html): A 5-step process for finding the right pages to refresh and measuring whether the refresh actually worked.
- [How to Scale Facebook Ads Budget Without Resetting Learning Phase](https://rewansh.com/blog/scale-facebook-ads-budget-without-resetting-learning.html): Safe increment sizes, timing, and alternatives for scaling Meta Ads budget without triggering a learning reset.
- [How to Reverse Engineer a Competitor's Paid Ad Strategy](https://rewansh.com/blog/reverse-engineer-competitor-paid-strategy.html): How to use free ad transparency libraries and landing page analysis to read a competitor's paid strategy.
- [A D2C Brand Marketing Strategy Template](https://rewansh.com/blog/d2c-brand-marketing-strategy-template.html): A fill-in-the-blank strategy template: positioning, channel roles, content pillars, retention, and a 90-day calendar.
- [What Is a Good Conversion Rate for Meta Ads?](https://rewansh.com/blog/good-conversion-rate-for-meta-ads.html): Why Meta Ads conversion rate benchmarks depend on objective and audience temperature more than industry.
- [A Paid Media Strategy Framework (Presentation-Ready Structure)](https://rewansh.com/blog/paid-media-strategy-framework.html): A 6-slide structure for presenting a paid media strategy to stakeholders, from goal to reporting cadence.
- [Cost Per Conversion Calculator (Free Tool)](https://rewansh.com/blog/cost-per-conversion-calculator.html): A live cost-per-conversion calculator, plus how to read the number against a real target.
- [Lead Velocity Rate (LVR) Calculator](https://rewansh.com/blog/lead-velocity-rate-calculator.html): A live LVR calculator, healthy benchmark ranges, and what to check when growth stalls.

- [A Content Marketing Calendar Generator (Free, Exports to Notion/CSV)](https://rewansh.com/blog/content-marketing-calendar-template-notion.html): Set a cadence and pillars, generate a dated calendar, and export it straight into Notion via CSV.

- [A Digital Marketing Audit Scorecard Framework](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-audit-framework-excel.html): A weighted 1-5 scorecard across 6 categories for tracking marketing health quarter over quarter.
- [A/B Testing Tool Alternatives to Optimizely](https://rewansh.com/blog/ab-testing-tool-alternatives-optimizely.html): A tiered evaluation framework for choosing an A/B testing tool that actually fits your team's size and testing volume.
- [Tracking Pixel Implementation Errors: How to Find and Fix Them](https://rewansh.com/blog/tracking-pixel-implementation-error-fix.html): Common Meta Pixel, Google tag, and GA4 implementation errors, with a test protocol and fixes.
- [Meta Ads Attribution Window, Explained](https://rewansh.com/blog/meta-attribution-window-explained.html): What the Meta Ads attribution window actually measures, and how to pick the right setting for your funnel.
- [How to Run a Conversion Funnel Leakage Analysis](https://rewansh.com/blog/conversion-funnel-leakage-analysis.html): A step-by-step method for finding and prioritizing the funnel step that's actually costing you the most conversions.
- [A Content Repurposing Framework for LinkedIn](https://rewansh.com/blog/content-repurposing-framework-linkedin.html): A 5-post extraction framework for turning one article into two weeks of genuinely distinct LinkedIn content.
- [Technical SEO Fixes to Protect Your Crawl Budget](https://rewansh.com/blog/technical-seo-fixes-fast-crawl-budget.html): Six technical fixes that stop wasted crawler requests from delaying indexing on larger sites.
- [An Organic Pipeline Generation Strategy for B2B (Not Just Traffic)](https://rewansh.com/blog/organic-pipeline-generation-strategy.html): Why SEO, content, and distribution need one shared asset plan — and a 90-day sequence to build it.
- [The Best Marketing Tech Stack for a Bootstrapped SaaS](https://rewansh.com/blog/best-marketing-tech-stack-bootstrapped-saas.html): The minimum connected tool stack — analytics, CRM, SEO, tracking, automation — for a bootstrapped SaaS.
- [An Enterprise SEO Audit Methodology](https://rewansh.com/blog/enterprise-seo-audit-methodology.html): A 5-phase SEO audit methodology built for large, multi-team sites where stakeholder alignment matters as much as technical findings.
- [The Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Checklist for 2026](https://rewansh.com/blog/generative-engine-optimization-checklist.html): A GEO checklist covering crawler access, content structure, entity signals, and citation measurement for 2026.
- [The B2B Content Distribution Checklist (Beyond "Just Publish It")](https://rewansh.com/blog/b2b-content-distribution-checklist.html): A distribution-first checklist across owned, earned, and paid channels for B2B content that gets seen.
- [The Conversion Tracking Validation Checklist (Before You Trust Your Numbers)](https://rewansh.com/blog/conversion-tracking-validation-checklist.html): A step-by-step checklist to validate GA4, Google Ads, and Meta conversion tracking before trusting the numbers.
- [How to Fix Meta Ads Audience Fragmentation](https://rewansh.com/blog/meta-ads-audience-fragmentation-fix.html): A consolidation framework for fixing fragmented, underfunded Meta ad sets stuck in Learning Limited.
- [The Creative Testing Matrix for Meta Ads (Free Interactive Tool)](https://rewansh.com/blog/creative-testing-matrix-meta-ads.html): A free interactive tool that generates a hook × format × CTA test matrix sized to your budget, plus how to read results.
- [The Technical SEO Checklist for a Site Migration (Without Losing Rankings)](https://rewansh.com/blog/technical-seo-checklist-site-migration.html): A launch-sequenced technical SEO checklist for domain changes, replatforms, and URL migrations.
- [How to Do a Keyword Gap Analysis, Step by Step](https://rewansh.com/blog/keyword-gap-analysis-guide.html): A step-by-step process for finding, filtering, and prioritizing competitor keyword gaps into a content calendar.
- [How to Scale Lead Generation Using AI Agents (Without Losing Personalization)](https://rewansh.com/blog/scale-lead-generation-ai-agents.html): A layered AI-agent lead gen stack — research, drafting, qualification — with the deliverability guardrails that keep it working.
- [How to Increase Organic Traffic: A Practical Framework](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-increase-organic-traffic.html): Technical SEO, intent-mapped content, topical authority, link building, and AI answer engine optimization.
- [How to Lower Customer Acquisition Cost Without Cutting Growth](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-lower-customer-acquisition-cost.html): Channel audits, conversion fixes, owned-channel investment, and automation.

- [How AI Is Changing Digital Marketing in 2026](https://rewansh.com/blog/ai-digital-marketing-trends.html): Content at scale, AI-driven paid media, and the SEO/AEO split.
- [Digital Marketing Consultant vs. Agency vs. Freelancer: How to Choose](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-consultant-vs-agency-vs-freelancer.html): A framework for matching stage, budget, and access needs to the right format.

- [Social Media Marketing Strategy for D2C & SaaS Brands](https://rewansh.com/blog/social-media-marketing-strategy-d2c-saas.html): Why D2C and SaaS need different platform and content strategies.

- [How Much Does a Digital Marketing Consultant Cost in the US in 2026?](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-consultant-cost-us.html): US pricing compared across freelancers, consultants, and agencies.
